title: Interventional Pulmonary
subtitle: Advanced minimally invasive procedures for complex lung and airway conditions
approachText: Our interventional pulmonology team performs advanced minimally invasive procedures for diagnosis and treatment of complex lung and airway conditions. Using state-of-the-art technology, we provide options that reduce the need for more invasive surgical procedures.

procedures.title: Flexible & Rigid Bronchoscopy
procedures.description: Visualization and treatment of airway disorders.

procedures.title: EBUS with TBNA
procedures.description: Endobronchial ultrasound for lymph node sampling.

procedures.title: Navigational Bronchoscopy
procedures.description: Advanced imaging for peripheral lung lesion evaluation.

procedures.title: Airway Stent Placement
procedures.description: Management of airway obstruction with stent therapy.

procedures.title: Endobronchial Valve Placement
procedures.description: Treatment of emphysema with minimally invasive technique.

procedures.title: Foreign Body Removal
procedures.description: Safe extraction of aspirated foreign material.

procedures.title: Whole Lung Lavage
procedures.description: Therapeutic lung cleansing for specialized conditions.

procedures.title: Pleural Procedures
procedures.description: Thoracentesis, pleurodesis, and tunneled pleural catheter placement.

conditions.title: Lung Cancer Staging
conditions.description: Diagnostic procedures for cancer diagnosis and staging.

conditions.title: Mediastinal Lymphadenopathy
conditions.description: Evaluation of enlarged mediastinal lymph nodes.

conditions.title: Central Airway Obstruction
conditions.description: Treatment of airway narrowing from various causes.

conditions.title: Tracheal Stenosis
conditions.description: Management of airway narrowing and strictures.

conditions.title: Malignant Pleural Effusions
conditions.description: Treatment of fluid accumulation from cancer.

conditions.title: Benign Pleural Effusions
conditions.description: Diagnosis and management of non-cancerous pleural fluid.

conditions.title: Bronchopleural Fistula
conditions.description: Treatment of abnormal communication between airway and pleura.

ctaText: Contact us today to learn more about our interventional pulmonary services and schedule your consultation.
